supersedes: P48 edge-monitoring stream rule (P48 assigned edge monitoring to PLATT_CALIBRATED; V2 assigns it to RAW_SIGMOID fip_signal_side_aware_edge)
P49 SAMPLE_LIMITED dominance over CRITICAL (P49 let SAMPLE_LIMITED suppress genuine CALIBRATION_CRITICAL; V2 prohibits this suppression)
P49 Platt-edge drift interpretation (P49 classified May/Jun/Aug 2025 Platt-edge alerts as genuine drift; P50 confirmed stream mismatch; V2 uses correct stream)
preserves: P48 fixture schema concept — monitoring_row_schema fields retained as V2 base
P48 ECE/Brier thresholds — ece_warning=0.10, ece_critical=0.12, brier_warning=0.25, brier_critical=0.27 unchanged
P48 edge thresholds — mean_edge_warning=0.07, critical=CI_crosses_zero unchanged
P48 DATA_GAP_BLOCKED dominance rule — retained in V2
P49 offline replay concept — batch replay against historical records retained
P47 Platt selection for calibration monitoring — PLATT_CALIBRATED remains canonical for ECE/Brier

metric_ownership_matrix.stream_detail: sigmoid(1.0 * sp_fip_delta) — FIP informativeness signal, k=1.0, side-aware (P43/P44 canonical definition)
metric_ownership_matrix.rationale: P43/P44 edge framework was designed with sigmoid(sp_fip_delta) as the model probability. P49 substituted trained ML model_home_prob (regularized toward 0.5), causing P50-confirmed stream mismatch. V2 restores the canonical P43/P44 FIP-signal edge semantics.
metric_ownership_matrix.source_phase: P43, P44, P50 (root cause), P51 (revision replay)

metric_ownership_matrix.stream_detail: Platt scaling: A=0.435432, B=0.245464, sigmoid_k=0.8 (locked from P45, not re-optimizable without explicit CEO authorization)
metric_ownership_matrix.rationale: P45 showed Platt scaling improves ECE vs raw sigmoid on 2025 data. P46 showed isotonic regression had weaker temporal generalization. P47 selected PLATT_CALIBRATED as canonical calibration monitoring stream. V2 retains this selection.

metric_ownership_matrix.stream_detail: N/A — count of games in batch
metric_ownership_matrix.rationale: Batches with n < 100 produce unreliable edge CI and ECE estimates. SAMPLE_LIMITED status must be reported alongside (not instead of) metric alerts. Critical alerts must not be suppressed by sample status.

alert_rules.dominance_rule: SAMPLE_LIMITED dominates WARNING alerts; SAMPLE_LIMITED must NOT suppress CRITICAL alerts — both statuses reported separately

metric_ownership_matrix.v2_correction_from_p49: P49 incorrectly let SAMPLE_LIMITED mask CALIBRATION_CRITICAL for Sep 2025 (platt_ece=0.1229, n=98). V2 prohibits this suppression.

metric_ownership_matrix.rationale: Missing closing-line odds for the target analysis scope blocks market-edge validation. The 2024 data gap is a cross-year blocker only and must not block 2025-only offline replay.

alert_rules.blocked_condition: required closing-line source missing for target scope
alert_rules.2024_scope: 2024 closing-line missing → cross-year market-edge validation blocked (P43_BLOCKED_BY_DATA_GAP). Does not block 2025-only replay.
alert_rules.dominance: DATA_GAP_BLOCKED dominates all if current-scope data absent

monitoring_row_schema_v2.basis: P48 monitoring_row_schema with P51/P52 stream corrections
monitoring_row_schema_v2.v2_key_change: V2 adds explicit edge_probability_stream and calibration_probability_stream fields so every monitoring row declares which stream was used. This prevents the P49 confusion where a single 'probability_stream' field was used for both edge and calibration monitoring.

warning.description: Edge below minimum threshold — degrading signal

critical.description: CI crosses zero — edge not statistically distinguishable from 0

edge_rules.v2_note: P44 2025 baseline: all 6 months have fip_signal_side_aware_edge CI_low > 0 (range: 0.055 to 0.128). Thresholds are appropriate for this stream.

calibration_rules.v2_note: Thresholds unchanged from P48. Only stream assignment corrected.

sample_rules.dominance_rule: SAMPLE_LIMITED dominates WARNING alerts only. CRITICAL alerts (edge or calibration) must be reported even when batch_n < 100. Both sample_status and metric_status must be stored separately.
sample_rules.v2_correction: P49 let SAMPLE_LIMITED mask CALIBRATION_CRITICAL for Sep 2025 (n=98, platt_ece=0.1229). V2 explicitly prohibits this suppression pattern.

2024_scope.action: DATA_GAP_BLOCKED for cross-year market-edge validation only
2024_scope.current_status: MISSING — P43_BLOCKED_BY_DATA_GAP confirmed. Does not block 2025-only replay.

data_gap_rules.dominance: DATA_GAP_BLOCKED dominates all alert levels if current-scope data absent

alert_dominance_order: 1. DATA_GAP_BLOCKED: dominates all if required current-scope data absent
2. CRITICAL: EDGE_DRIFT_CRITICAL or CALIBRATION_CRITICAL take priority
3. SAMPLE_LIMITED: dominates WARNING but must NOT hide CRITICAL
5. MIXED_ALERTS: when alerts span multiple metric families at same severity
alert_rule_matrix_v2.cross_family_handling: Cross-family alerts must be preserved separately. Do not collapse CALIBRATION_CRITICAL into SAMPLE_LIMITED. Report both edge_status and calibration_status independently in every row.

retained_rules_from_p48.rationale: Threshold validated against P44 Tier C baseline ECE (0.095). Appropriate.
Sep 2025 platt_ece=0.1229 confirmed genuine critical under this threshold.
P44 baseline Brier score 0.248 is near boundary; threshold is conservative.
No months exceeded 0.27 in 2025. Threshold appropriate.
Threshold valid for RAW_SIGMOID stream. P44 monthly fip_signal_side_aware_edge range was 0.095–0.148, well above 0.07.
P44 all months have CI_low > 0.055 under correct RAW_SIGMOID stream.
Prevents false OK signals when required data is absent.

retained_rules_from_p48.description: Monitoring row schema with identity, metrics, status, trace fields
retained_rules_from_p48.rationale: V2 extends schema by adding explicit stream declaration fields.

retained_rules_from_p48.description: Offline batch replay against historical JSONL records
retained_rules_from_p48.rationale: Replay methodology is sound; only stream assignment changes.

deprecated_rules_from_p48_p49.description: P48/P49 implicitly used PLATT_CALIBRATED (model_home_prob after Platt) for edge monitoring, not explicitly documented but reflected in P49 edge metrics that used model_home_prob instead of sigmoid(sp_fip_delta).
deprecated_rules_from_p48_p49.evidence: P50 confirmed: May/Jun 2025 EDGE_DRIFT_CRITICAL dissolved when edge metric changed to fip_signal_side_aware_edge. P51 replay eliminated 2 monthly and 3 rolling false CRITICALs.

deprecated_rules_from_p48_p49.description: P49 let SAMPLE_LIMITED mask CALIBRATION_CRITICAL. Sep 2025 (n=98, platt_ece=0.1229 > 0.12) was classified SAMPLE_LIMITED instead of CALIBRATION_CRITICAL.
deprecated_rules_from_p48_p49.superseded_by: V2 rule: SAMPLE_LIMITED dominates WARNING only. CRITICAL must always be reported even at n < 100.
deprecated_rules_from_p48_p49.evidence: P51 revised replay classified Sep 2025 as CALIBRATION_CRITICAL, revealing a genuine calibration issue that P49 masked.

deprecated_rules_from_p48_p49.description: P49 schema had a single 'probability_stream' field used for both edge and calibration metrics. This ambiguity enabled the stream mismatch.
deprecated_rules_from_p48_p49.superseded_by: V2 schema has separate 'edge_probability_stream' and 'calibration_probability_stream' fields.
deprecated_rules_from_p48_p49.evidence: P50 root-cause analysis identified ambiguous stream assignment as primary driver.

september_2025_calibration_issue.p49_error: P49 let SAMPLE_LIMITED (n=98 < 100) suppress CALIBRATION_CRITICAL (platt_ece=0.1229 > 0.12). This was a dominance-rule bug.
september_2025_calibration_issue.edge_health: Edge healthy (fip_edge ~0.147, CI_low > 0). Issue is calibration only.
september_2025_calibration_issue.p53_recommendation: P53 should investigate Sep 2025 calibration degradation. Possible causes: late-season pitcher-FIP regression, market adaptation, or Platt constants drifting. Platt constants are locked from P45 and cannot be updated without explicit authorization.
september_2025_calibration_issue.tracking_rule: Future offline replays must report CALIBRATION_CRITICAL for Sep 2025 until the root cause is resolved or a full-year recalibration is authorized.

unresolved_data_gaps.description: 2024 MLB moneyline closing-line odds are not available in the repository. data/mlb_2025/derived/mlb_2024_sp_fip_delta_features.jsonl does not contain Home ML / Away ML columns (all null). data/mlb_2025/mlb-2024-asplayed.csv is Retrosheet gamelog only — no odds.
unresolved_data_gaps.impact_scope: CROSS_YEAR_ONLY — does not block 2025-only offline replay
unresolved_data_gaps.resolution_path: If mlb_odds_2024_real.csv is sourced with schema matching mlb_odds_2025_real.csv (Date, Away, Home, scores, Away ML, Home ML), re-run P43 script — load_2024_unified() stub already exists.

framing_note: P52 is a paper-only, offline, diagnostic artifact. It formalizes the V2 monitoring contract from P51 findings without deploying, proposing production usage, or overwriting any prior phase artifacts. No runtime recommendation logic is changed. No live API calls made.

future_recommendations.P53: Investigate Sep 2025 CALIBRATION_CRITICAL (platt_ece=0.1229). Determine if late-season calibration drift is real or a regime change.
future_recommendations.P54: If/when 2024 closing-line odds are sourced, re-run P43 cross-year validation.
future_recommendations.P55: When ≥2 full seasons of data available under V2 contract, evaluate whether Platt constants require recalibration.

limitations: V2 contract validated only against 2025 season (n=535 Tier C games).
Sep 2025 CALIBRATION_CRITICAL root cause not yet determined.
Cross-year market-edge validation requires 2024 odds data.
No deployment proposed. No production implementation.
Platt constants locked from P45 — recalibration requires authorization.
